title: Meet the millennial changing the way you buy and sell property in the Garden Route
description: BUSINESS NEWS - If you’ve spent any...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - If you’ve spent any time scrolling through property listings, hopping between show houses, or trying to decode the mysteries of transfers and timelines, you’ve probably felt it: real estate can be… a lot.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - If you’ve spent any time scrolling through property listings, hopping between show houses, or trying to decode the mysteries of transfers and timelines, you’ve probably felt it: real estate can be… a lot."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It’s fast-moving, it’s emotional, and it often feels stuck somewhere between the 90s and a never-ending episode of Grand Designs.","html":"It’s fast-moving, it’s emotional, and it often feels stuck somewhere between the 90s and a never-ending episode of Grand Designs."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Hi, I’m Bratt, your resident millennial real estate agent, Garden Route enthusiast, and the guy determined to make property feel a little more human, a little more forward-thinking, and a whole lot less stressful."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Let’s be honest: the property world hasn’t exactly kept up with the pace of how the rest of us live. We’re a generation raised on the internet, shaped by recessions, and powered by iced coffee and Wi-Fi. We know the value of time, transparency, and getting things done properly and that’s exactly the mindset I bring into real estate.","html":"Let’s be honest: the property world hasn’t exactly kept up with the pace of how the rest of us live. We’re a generation raised on the internet, shaped by recessions, and powered by iced coffee and Wi-Fi. We know the value of time, transparency, and getting things done properly and that’s exactly the mindset I bring into real estate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Real estate doesn’t need more jargon, gatekeeping, or agents who ghost you when the going gets tough. It needs honesty, communication, and someone who actually listens to what you want, not what they think you want.","html":"Real estate doesn’t need more jargon, gatekeeping, or agents who ghost you when the going gets tough. It needs honesty, communication, and someone who actually listens to what you want, not what they think you want."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"I’m not here to “sell” you anything. I’m here to guide you through one of the biggest financial decisions you’ll ever make, with the same care I’d offer a friend. Because let’s face it; property is personal. Whether you’re upsizing, downsizing, relocating, escaping, investing, or starting fresh, you're moving your life, not just your furniture.","html":"I’m not here to “sell” you anything. I’m here to guide you through one of the biggest financial decisions you’ll ever make, with the same care I’d offer a friend. Because let’s face it; property is personal. Whether you’re upsizing, downsizing, relocating, escaping, investing, or starting fresh, you're moving your life, not just your furniture."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Millennials are rewriting how people buy and sell homes. We research everything, ask the hard questions, care about sustainability, look for lifestyle value, and we’re not afraid to hold people accountable. And if I’m representing you, you’d better believe I’m bringing that same energy to the table.","html":"Millennials are rewriting how people buy and sell homes. We research everything, ask the hard questions, care about sustainability, look for lifestyle value, and we’re not afraid to hold people accountable. And if I’m representing you, you’d better believe I’m bringing that same energy to the table."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Here’s the thing: real estate is more than opening doors and pointing out built-in cupboards. It’s problem-solving, marketing, crisis management, negotiation, late-night phone calls, early-morning WhatsApps, and navigating human emotions with the skill of a diplomat and the patience of a monk.","html":"Here’s the thing: real estate is more than opening doors and pointing out built-in cupboards. It’s problem-solving, marketing, crisis management, negotiation, late-night phone calls, early-morning WhatsApps, and navigating human emotions with the skill of a diplomat and the patience of a monk."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When you work with me, you’re getting someone who treats your property with the same attention as if it were my own, markets with intention and creativity, uses strong negotiation backed by data and logic, and keeps you informed every step of the way. No disappearing acts. No vague updates. No sugar-coated nonsense. And yes, I will absolutely stage your cushions before a showing if needed. Millennials love an aesthetic.","html":"When you work with me, you’re getting someone who treats your property with the same attention as if it were my own, markets with intention and creativity, uses strong negotiation backed by data and logic, and keeps you informed every step of the way. No disappearing acts. No vague updates. No sugar-coated nonsense. And yes, I will absolutely stage your cushions before a showing if needed. Millennials love an aesthetic."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"And because we’re already living online, digital marketing isn’t an optional extra, it’s the backbone of selling property today. If you’re selling a home, your buyer is already scrolling, comparing, shortlisting, and judging listings in under a second.","html":"And because we’re already living online, digital marketing isn’t an optional extra, it’s the backbone of selling property today. If you’re selling a home, your buyer is already scrolling, comparing, shortlisting, and judging listings in under a second."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"That’s where I thrive. My marketing goes beyond “good photos” and generic descriptions. It’s strategic and storytelling-driven, using high-end photography, cinematic videos, short-form content, targeted advertising, and clean modern copy that actually connects with buyers. Your property gets real visibility not just another post lost in the feed.","html":"That’s where I thrive. My marketing goes beyond “good photos” and generic descriptions. It’s strategic and storytelling-driven, using high-end photography, cinematic videos, short-form content, targeted advertising, and clean modern copy that actually connects with buyers. Your property gets real visibility not just another post lost in the feed."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Being a local agent means I understand the lifestyle that makes the Garden Route so magnetic."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From lagoon views to forest pockets to coastal sunsets and neighbourhoods with character, this region has layers. I know which areas are growing, which offer peace, which offer convenience, and where future investment value lives. Property isn’t just bricks and mortar, it's how you want to live, and helping people find that perfect fit is my favourite part of what I do.","html":"From lagoon views to forest pockets to coastal sunsets and neighbourhoods with character, this region has layers. I know which areas are growing, which offer peace, which offer convenience, and where future investment value lives. Property isn’t just bricks and mortar, it's how you want to live, and helping people find that perfect fit is my favourite part of what I do."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Being a millennial isn’t a limitation, it’s an advantage. It means I value clear communication, adapt quickly, use tech to your advantage, bring creativity to problem-solving, understand modern buyers, and take professionalism seriously. We’re the generation that has to hustle, innovate, and stay resilient, and that energy shows up in how I represent my clients. There are no shortcuts here, just genuine commitment, strong ethics, and a service-driven mindset.","html":"Being a millennial isn’t a limitation, it’s an advantage. It means I value clear communication, adapt quickly, use tech to your advantage, bring creativity to problem-solving, understand modern buyers, and take professionalism seriously. We’re the generation that has to hustle, innovate, and stay resilient, and that energy shows up in how I represent my clients. There are no shortcuts here, just genuine commitment, strong ethics, and a service-driven mindset."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"People often ask why I chose real estate, and the answer is simple: I genuinely love it. I love the stories, the movement, the strategy, the relationships, and the privilege of being part of major life transitions. Real estate is more than my career, it's my craft, and yes, it still excites me every single day.","html":"People often ask why I chose real estate, and the answer is simple: I genuinely love it. I love the stories, the movement, the strategy, the relationships, and the privilege of being part of major life transitions. Real estate is more than my career, it's my craft, and yes, it still excites me every single day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"So, if you’re looking for an agent who communicates like a human, markets like a creator, negotiates with intention, works like a teammate, thinks like a millennial, and cares like a friend, I'm your guy. Buying or selling shouldn’t feel like a headache; it should feel like progress. And with the right agent, it can even feel fun.","html":"So, if you’re looking for an agent who communicates like a human, markets like a creator, negotiates with intention, works like a teammate, thinks like a millennial, and cares like a friend, I'm your guy. Buying or selling shouldn’t feel like a headache; it should feel like progress. And with the right agent, it can even feel fun."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you’re ready for a fresh, honest, modern, and slightly quirky approach to real estate, reach out. Let’s grab a coffee, iced or hot, I don’t discriminate and talk about your next move.","html":"If you’re ready for a fresh, honest, modern, and slightly quirky approach to real estate, reach out. Let’s grab a coffee, iced or hot, I don’t discriminate and talk about your next move."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Contact Bratley Esau:"},{"type":"list","items":["065 859 2233","[email protected]","www.seeff.com"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your property journey deserves transparency, energy, creativity, and someone who genuinely gives a damn.","html":"Your property journey deserves transparency, energy, creativity, and someone who genuinely gives a damn."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"And that’s exactly what I bring to the table.","html":"And that’s exactly what I bring to the table."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
